microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across strategic enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defined product requirements, architected self-service scheduling capabilities, and deployed the system end-to-end, reducing operational toil by **30%** and transitioning execution to a fully scalable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfaced critical hardware defects and established a repeatable model for continuous, production-grade validation at scale.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, owning full lifecycle from discovery through deployment and post-execution monitoring.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring end-to-end planning workflows to cut cycle time by 39% and increase drill throughput capacity by 21% — pattern later adopted as a platform-wide capability informing the broader resilience roadmap.
microsoft_2023: Championed **full-stack adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows by embedding directly with 14 Azure service teams — ran live demos, led training sessions, and iterated on tooling feedback to drive sustained utilization saving **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and converting field findings into a prioritized, scalable platform capability.

Improved data retrieval reliability by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system — reduced lookup time by **83%** and established a repeatable data modeling standard adopted across the team.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch timelines by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework — embedded with 140+ teams to define shared execution standards and ship a scalable deployment model.

Ran structured discovery across **20+ service teams** to map 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built and delivered a full-lifecycle roadmap to automate critical paths — converting one-off customer pain points into durable, platform-level infrastructure solutions.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, sequence high-impact investments, and make data-driven prioritization decisions across the region launch portfolio.
amazon_robotics: Delivered **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the full-lifecycle legacy OS migration strategy — mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, sequenced the rollout, and deployed the solution end-to-end in a live production environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **triaging 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and unblock parallel workstreams — maintained delivery velocity across a cross-functional engineering team under tight timelines.

Drove **cross-functional alignment** across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable, monitored release model for ongoing production deployments.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals — redesigned the CRM workflow from discovery through close, cutting turnaround time and establishing a scalable, repeatable customer engagement process.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimized the website and Google Business profile based on user behavior data, shipping improvements iteratively against measured performance outcomes.

Improved leadership **pricing models and margin visibility** by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ historical project records — identified systemic margin leaks, quantified the business impact, and delivered a prioritized action plan to close the gaps.
